query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `lender_intro_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `lenderId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `lenderName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `isaId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `isaName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `investorName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `investorEmail` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `financingType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `budget` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `timeline` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `sentAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `lender_intro_log_lenderId_idx` (`lenderId`),
  CONSTRAINT `lender_intro_log_lenderId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`lenderId`) REFERENCES `lender_config` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
